channel.title: Writeups on seraldinho.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Writeups on seraldinho.github.io

item.title: HackTheBox - DevArea
item.author: nseral@proton.me (Nicolás Seral)
item.description: OS: Linux | Dificultad: Medium | Conceptos: Hoverfly, SSRF, Servicios, Flask, Writable bash
